test_result.test: claude_evaluation

scored_hypotheses.claim: The manuscript's text structure reflects a single, coherent narrative.

test_result.test: claude_evaluation
test_result.details: The 70.1% hapax ratio strongly contradicts coherent narrative structure, as meaningful texts repeat thematic vocabulary; while Zipfian distribution suggests some organizational principle, the extreme word diversity indicates fragmented or cipher-like content rather than unified discourse.
